prompts: Cinematic shot in a warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library; Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a short guild cloak, stands opposite Natsu Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes and neat gloves. They both raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice, with soft, glowing mana ribbons beginning to weave between their palms. High quality, readable body motion, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the arcane library; Natsu Dawncrest carefully adjusts his hand position, causing the glowing mana ribbons to stabilize into a calm, steady flow between him and Natsu Ashbell. Both characters maintain a focused, cooperative expression, demonstrating teamwork in their magical research. No combat, no harm, no text, no watermark.
